name: Cucumber Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cucumbers may be peeled or unpeeled.
2. Melt butter and sauté onions until soft.
3. Dice cucumbers and add to the pot; add flour and stir well.
4. Add chicken broth, vinegar, and dill weed. Stir well.
5. Cook for 30 minutes.
6. Puree while adding sour cream.
7. Serve chilled or hot.
